title: Poke Eye the Longshoreman
description: Poke Eye the Longshoreman is a marble-mouthed ruffian who solves problems with his fists. After a helping of beets, he beats the Jiminy Crickets out of that villain!
quote: Gets a taste of me sucker punch, ya big palooka!
studio: The End Of Your Lifetime Channel
altHero: Poke Eye the Longshoreman, a bald, eye-patched sailor man with huge forearms
alt1: Poke Eye faces down a much bigger, gruffer sailor
alt3: Poke Eye getting a burst of strength
alt4: Poke Eye about to hit the bigger sailor, but his hands are ballooned up with “Sucker” written on them
